data.description:
## What
Enrich the db-migrations overlay prompt with dso content: recall patterns AND FP-guards (both halves), per the
locked principle that domain rubric lives in the overlay, not the generic Pass-2 verifier. Recall: delete+replace migration symmetry (both sides verified), destructive migrations, backfill correctness, expand/contract sequencing, lock duration.

## Files
- src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-db-migrations.md
- eval spec + fixtures for the db-migrations overlay (recall + no-fire cases)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] db-migrations overlay carries both recall patterns and FP-discrimination guards.
- [ ] Lands with a passing recall + no-fire eval; does not over-suppress valid patterns.
- [ ] Overlay remains advisory; no domain rubric leaks into code-review-verify.md.
data.title: db-migrations overlay enrichment
